titleStmt.title: SII 25.290: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 290.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
koṟcaṭaiyapaṉmar tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī vīrapāṇṭiya tevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 2 Irupattu Iraṇṭāvatu kaṉṉināyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu trayodaśiyum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirattunāḷ Arumoḻi vaḷanāṭṭu ṟṟūr kūṟṟattu tirupputtūr Uṭai Aṟaṅkāṭṭi Āṇṭanāyaṉār koyil tevar kaṉmikaḷḷukku Ināyaṉār koyil tāṉattārom viḷayan nāyaṉār tiru kuṭutta paricāvatu nilappiṟamāṇam paṇṇi piccaimaṭattu cantāṉattu tiruñāṉacampanta—
mahecuracivaṟkku munāḷ piccaimaṭattu cantāṉattu tiruveṇkāṭṭu mutaliyār vaṭaiyalāṉa Irumuṭicoḻac caruppeti maṅkalattu Ivūr Uḷkaṭaiyil maṭakkāṇiyā vilaikoṇṭu Ivar Aṉupovittatavo Āṟṟu pa lam Arai y ciṉṉamum Inta tiruñāṉacampaṉtaṉ maṭattukku macakkāṇi Āka perum ṭiya tevarkku patiṉnālāvatu nāḷḷile tiruveṇkāṭṭu mutaliyar I� ṭuttu Inta maṭattil mutaliyar tirumukam Eḻuti ku ṉi Āka Aṉupovittu potāniṟka—
mai Aṟiyātapaṭiyāle nāṅkaḷ Inta paṭukai nilattile tirucūlatāṉam paṇṇukaiyil Iṟṟai nāḷ nilaṅkalanta mākecurarum tāṉattārum nāṭum nakaramu komuṟṟamarumMay be inferpreted as ‘King’. camaiya kāriyattukku kaṭavārum Ivva viṭattu cātaṉa cākkiyālum Aṉupokaṅkaḷālum Inta paṭukai ṉi Ākaiyil Inta tiruccūla tevarkku tiru Iruppāka niccayittu nāṅkuḻi 10 pattum ma vittu koṇṭa Inta paṭukaiyil vi ma vittu koṇṭu Inta kuḻi 10 pattukku talai—
ṇi Āka nāṅkaḷ pariyavaittuk kuṭukka Ikoyil tevarkaṉmi kulottuṅka paṭṭar Irāmaṉ ne � ṇṭu Uṭaiya Ivaraṉupovittu varukiṟa nila ttu Inta kuḻi 10 vu pariyavaittik(k) kuṭuttu Ippaṭikku pariyavai paṇṇi kuṭuttu taṉmatāṉa tamum pattu virapiṟa piṟamāṇamu ku maṭakkāṇiyil nāṅkaḷ vicāriyāmal—
ruḷi paṇṇiṉa Itukku melum kaiy vantapaṭi ceyyāmal nilaṅkalanta mākecurarum camaiyttukkaṭā varum komuṟṟavarum nāṭu varum cayitta Inta paṭukai nilattu nilam ṉatu yaṉu va� l nā kāṇi
tāṉamuṭaiyar nālāyirapaṭṭaṉār mutukaṇṇāka Uṭaiya naṅ ṭācāraṉ l ceppiyaṉ pācaiyil nāṅkaḷ vilaikoṇṭu tirunāmattu kāṇiyākak kuṭutta viḷanilattukku Ellai Āvatu kiḻakku sa2 yā Aṟaṅkāṭṭi Āṇṭa nāyaṇār tirunāmattuk kāṇikku meṟkkum teṉpāṟkellai Innāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇikku vaṭakkum me kellai Ināya kāṇikku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai koyil Ālaivāy kkum Innāṅ Ellaiyil—
Digital edition of SII 25.290 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
